debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
Prod : Finset α → Finset nt → Type
inst✝ : Production α nt Prod
⊢ ∀ (word : Word α) (G : Grammar Prod),
    word ∈ coerceLang α G.Z G.GeneratedLanguage → ∃ word₂ ∈ G.GeneratedLanguage, coerceWord α G.Z word₂ = word

proof:
intro word G h
    rcases h with ⟨word₂, hmem, rfl⟩
    exact ⟨word₂, hmem, rfl⟩
